name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept Event for a FW/Router/Switch Device
notes: Defines Firewall or ACL Accept events from FW / Router / Switch devices.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept Event for a FW/Router/Switch Device on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch, BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept Event for a FW/Router/Switch Device on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch, BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept
